## Claude for Outlook

Triage your inbox in one prompt, draft replies that wait for you to send, and find time across calendars.

## How teams use Claude for Microsoft 365

Play videoPlay video

### Turn an email into a deliverable

Triage email, open the brief in Word, build the model in Excel, make the PowerPoint deck, draft the review invite. Context carries across each step.

### Clear your inbox before the meeting

Ask Claude what needs your attention, get replies drafted for a few quick wins, and open the brief from your inbox. The context comes with it into Word.

### Build a model from a brief

Ask Claude to build the model behind your Word brief. It opens Excel, pulls the numbers from the doc, and builds real formulas across multiple tabs.

### Draft in your template

Point Claude at a brief, a dataset, or a thread. It drafts sections in your heading styles, populates tables in place, and keeps your numbering intact.

## The Claude you trust, inside Microsoft 365

### Every edit is reviewable

Tracked changes in Word, highlighted cells in Excel, drafts that wait in Outlook. Nothing goes out or gets saved until you say so.

### Your templates and formatting

Claude uses your rules, whether for slide masters, heading styles, formula structures, or numbering so you stay on brand.

### Enterprise security, built in

Sign in with a Claude account, or connect through your existing cloud provider. Works within your existing compliance framework.

## Core capabilities across the apps you use every day

### One conversation across all your apps

Context carries from Outlook to Word to Excel to PowerPoint. Change one thing, and every open file catches up.

### Deploy through your preferred cloud

Connect through Microsoft Foundry, Amazon Bedrock, or Google Cloud Vertex AI credentials.

### Bring any document into the conversation

Drop a PDF or doc into any sidebar. Claude reads it alongside your open file and references it in other apps.

### Turn workflows into Skills

When a process is right, save it as a skill. The team can use it the same way in all four apps.

Learn more

Learn moreLearn more

### Type or talk, whichever is faster

Use dictation to talk to Claude in a sidebar instead of typing.

### Access connectors

Pull context from outside sources directly from the sidebar.

Learn more

Learn moreLearn more

## FAQ

### Where is this available?

Claude for Excel, PowerPoint, and Word are generally available on all paid Claude plans. Claude for Outlook is in beta on all paid plans.

### Can I connect through my cloud provider?

Yes. Claude for Microsoft 365 is available on Amazon Bedrock, Google Cloud Vertex AI, and Microsoft Foundry.

### Does Claude preserve my formatting and templates?

Yes. Claude inherits your heading styles, slide masters, formula conventions, and numbering. Edit one section without disturbing the rest.

### Can Claude send an email without me seeing it first?

No. Drafts and calendar invites open in Outlook's native compose form and wait for you to click send.
